name: Copy Relative Path
description: Copy selected item paths relative to the git root or current folder.
script:
base="$(git -C "$(dirname "${1:-$PWD}")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"
for item in "$@"; do
  case "$item" in
    "$base"/*) printf '%s\n' "${item#$base/}" ;;
    *) printf '%s\n' "$item" ;;
  esac
done | pbcopy
